summary: This is a brief announcement post rather than an essay. Joel Spolsky invites readers to an open house event at Fog Creek Software's new office in New York City. The post consists of just the date, time, and address. It reflects Joel's practice of using his blog for company updates alongside his longer analytical pieces.
key_points: Fog Creek Software moved to a new office at 535 8th Ave in Manhattan
Joel used his popular blog as a direct communication channel for company events
The open house format suggests Joel valued community engagement with his readers and the broader tech community
money_quotes: Fog Creek Software will host an open house at our new office on March 24th, 2004, at 6:00 PM.
key_insight: Joel leveraged his widely-read blog as a marketing and community-building tool for Fog Creek Software, blending company announcements with his editorial content.
